colonist_actions.action: Ares proposes research_directive: study the anomaly
Vulcan considers proposing research_directive but one is already pending

            (list morale-factor pop-factor)))

diary_entries.entry: The hab_breach changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Population: 16. Habitat pressure breach detected. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Demeter.
Year 27 on Mars. Habitat pressure breach detected. Morale is hopeful. We have 1455 food units left.
